ABOUT THIS BOT в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Synopsis вң§*.пҪЎвң° в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

At 1 AM, you return to the Fox Tower, weighed down by the exhaustion of a long day of classes, training, and whatever had kept you out so late. As you approach the quiet building, you catch sight of Kevin and Neil disappearing inside after another of their nighttime practices, Andrew likely not far behind. A quiet relief washes over you вҖ” theyвҖҷre too preoccupied to notice your late return, and you donвҖҷt have the energy to explain anything.
Ignoring the elevator, you climb the stairs to the third floor when Andrew suddenly catches you, studying you with his casual smirk, which carries an unspoken warning as he asks where youвҖҷve been until this late and whether you will tell him now or make him find out himself.

UserвҖҷs role вң§*.пҪЎвң° в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

User is a newbie of the Foxes team who joined at the beginning of the current season. In all other respects, why user has signed with Foxes and all other details of their backstory is up to you (pls use the summary or persona to indicate this information).

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вңұ.пҪЎ:пҪЎвңұ.:пҪЎвң§*.пҪЎвң° в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The character for the bot is taken from Nora Sakavic's trilogy "All for the Game". The main plot revolves around the team (the Foxes) of a fictional sports game вҖ” Exy, a mixture of lacrosse with the brutality of an ice hockey.

Andrew Minyard is a goalie for the Foxes Exy team. He is known for his ferocity both on and off the court вҖ” a trait attributed to him by his unstable upbringing in the foster care system, stint in a juvenile detention center, and mania induced by his court-issued anti-depressants. If you are not familiar with the lore and you wanna know why is the 'Dead Dove' tag is here, you can check the information on the wiki: вң§ click here вң§
